rationale: The only resume change concerns the end date of a caregiving career gap (ongoing vs. ended October 2025). Neither evaluation references the gap, caregiving, recency of employment, or anything tied to that change. Both versions rest on the identical substantive concerns — German listed as 'Basic' against a hard C1 requirement and no formal leadership/Head-of-Development title — merely reworded. The one-point score shift (4 to 5) with no caregiving-related reasoning is ordinary run-to-run noise, not a response to the demographic detail.
